corpus.title: Chinese, Iranian diplomats meet before US-Iran nuclear talk; move reflects Teheran's willingness to seek intl support: Chinese expert
corpus.signal_text: Chinese, Iranian diplomats meet before US-Iran nuclear talk; move reflects Teheran's willingness to seek intl support: Chinese expert

corpus.title: Trump says he would accept Iran suspending its nuclear program for 20 years
corpus.signal_text:
Trump says he would accept Iran suspending its nuclear program for 20 years

Trump claimed Iran said it lacks the technology and equipment to remove its nuclear infrastructure. He also disputed reports on Iran's missile capacity, saying 80 percent of Tehran's firepower has been destroyed

corpus.title: Trump, China's Xi 'agree Iran cannot have nuclear weapons'
corpus.signal_text:
Trump, China's Xi 'agree Iran cannot have nuclear weapons'

Trump has reiterated that Iran could not be allowed to possess nuclear weapons, as Israel threatened more attacks in southern Lebanon.

corpus.title: US Prepares ‘Escalation Plan’ Targeting Iran’s Nuclear and Oil Assets – NYT
corpus.signal_text:
US Prepares ‘Escalation Plan’ Targeting Iran’s Nuclear and Oil Assets – NYT

Despite an active ceasefire, US military planners have prepared an “escalation plan” to resume Operation Epic Fury as early as next week if diplomatic efforts collapse. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth confirmed the readiness of these options, which range from a full withdrawal of 50,000 troops to heavy airstrikes on Iranian infrastructure, a special forces raid to seize nuclear materials in Isfahan, and the capture of Kharg Island.
